reviews.comment:
Debe ser una de las pocas estaciones de servicio donde los bancos están impecables. Continuamente estan limpiandolos. La atencion de los playeros es cordial y servicial. Hay una zona verde amplia para caminar y que los niños jueguen en las amacas. Hay un local de productos regionales en el exterior. Lugar estratégico para los viajes a Rosario o en su retorno a BA, ya que se encuentra a mitad de camino y como hay que desviarse de la autopista, no hay muchos autos esperando para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
It must be one of the few gas stations where the benches are spotless. They're constantly being cleaned. The attendants are friendly and helpful. There's a large green area for walking and for children to play on the swings. There's a shop outside selling regional products. It's a strategic location for trips to Rosario or on the return to Buenos Aires, as it's halfway there, and since you have to turn off the highway, there aren't many cars waiting to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBN0stS2h3RRAB
